name: CECEP Solar Energy Co.,Ltd.
summary: CECEP Solar Energy Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, construction, and operation of photovoltaic power plants. It engages in the technology research and development, manufacture, and sale of monocrystalline silicon products, and polycrystalline silicon battery and components. The company also generates and sells solar energy; invests in, constructs, operates, maintains, and manages solar energy generation projects; provides solar energy generation planning, technology research and development, design consultation, integration, installation, and operation maintenance services; and other related business, as well as manufactures generating system devices. In addition, it provides electricity solution to production; and living electricity facilities for families, villages, hospitals, border posts, islands, and others. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Beijing, China. CECEP Solar Energy Co.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Energy Conservation and Environmental Protection Group.
